name: Ceiling Paint Calculator
seo_description: Use our free ceiling paint calculator to quickly estimate area_m2, litros_total based on area_m2, manos, color. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate paint needed for a 40m2 ceiling (2 coats).
result_context: The quantity calculada of {litros_total} L (+10%) includes 10% of waste. Ajusta depending on porosidad of the soporte.
mistakes: Not considering absorcion of the soporte in consumption
Forget Apply imprimacion before of the finish
desc: Ceiling Paint Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
